'''Artus Prime''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Artus system]] of the [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The planet primarily served as a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony, which was known for its [[Artusian crystal]]s which could also be used in the construction of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]].

Although the mining industry served as an important aspect of the planet's economy, Artus Prime was not considered a major destination hub in the Kwymar sector. Its population was relatively low, and its surface was mostly covered in canyons and toxic rivers, while the wildlife on the planet primarily included the scavenging and dangerous [[mine crab]]s.

==History==
[[File:Artus4.jpg|thumb|left|[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] fire at revolting prisoners in the [[Battle of Artus Prime]].]]
The colony administrator gave weekly reports with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The last one was about a discovery of a large deposit of Artusian crystals.<ref name="NRIR">{{LucasArts|url=products/outcast/html/spin.html|text=N.R.I. Reports|int=N.R.I. Reports}}</ref> Soon after the Mining Facility was captured by the [[Empire Reborn]] movement in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] as part of the fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Desann]]'s plans to create an army of [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force sensitive]] soldiers.<ref name="JK2">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref> 

The lack of communication alerted the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]], since the administrator was [[ordinance 20098-B|required]] to give information about the collection and processing; the [[Senator of Bilbringi]] requested to send a communications team to the colony. Eventually the [[Supply_ship/Legends|supply ship]] that was sent for that purpose disappeared at the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] and failed to return<ref name="NRIR" /> apparently intercepted by the Reborn Empire.

[[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] agent [[Kyle Katarn]] was sent there to investigate and discovered Desann's plot; soon after—in the [[Battle of Artus Prime]]—Katarn aided a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] battle fleet in recapturing the facility and liberating the planet.

Towards the end of the battle, Kyle confronted Desann, who had captured his professional partner [[Jan Ors]]. Kyle was beaten easily by Desann, who then tricked Kyle into believing Jan was murdered. This would lead Kyle to return to the [[Valley of the Jedi]], to regain his connection with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and seek out his revenge.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
